title: FUSION Adapter Definition
description: Validates fusion-adapters/<src>--<tgt>/definition.yaml. See docs/domain.md for the full directory contract.

kind.description: Must be 'adapter'. Discriminates against node definitions.

name.description: Kebab-case adapter identifier in the form <source>--<target>. Used as the directory name under fusion-adapters/.

source_type.description: The node type name on the source side of the integration.

target_type.description: The node type name on the target side of the integration.

variables_schema.description: Maps variable names to their type descriptors. Values must declare at minimum a 'type' field.

priority_tier.description: 1=infra (runs first), 2=service, 3=post-integration (runs last). Global ordering across the full solution deployment.

maturity.description: Lifecycle stage of this adapter artifact.
